content.en:
"It's all curse poison!"

Ye Tian glanced around, only to see the clouds in the sky, the rocks, trees, and water currents in the ground were completely covered by the curse Gu poison, a green scene.

If an ignorant person comes here, they think the environment is good.

But Ye Tian knew very well that this place was undoubtedly a Jedi for other creatures.

Ye Tian stood in the air, seemingly not in contact with the curse Gu poison, but the air was also filled with the aura of the curse Gu poison, which would invade Ye Tian's body little by little.

If it was just like this, it would naturally not affect Ye Tian, but the environment here was very bad, if Ye Tian didn't have the talent for poison spells, he wouldn't be able to exert much strength here at all, because he needed to use some strength to protect himself from being invaded by the curse poison.

In this way, it is difficult for his strength to be brought into play.

"Fortunately, I copied the god-level poison curse talent, and I can ignore the curse poison in the air!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Rumble!!!!

The earth cracked, and a humanoid creature appeared, which looked similar to a normal human, but a pair of hands that were not human hands, but a pair of spikes.

From this creature, Ye Tian felt the power of chaos and the extremely rich power of curse Gu poison.

Ye Tian used the replication talent to check the situation of this creature, but he didn't find any talent, it was obvious that this creature was transformed, not a real creature.

But this kind of transformed creature is often very terrifying, how powerful you want to be, you can create as powerful as you want, with the mystery of the Yuan Gu Palace, it is not very difficult to create a god-level creature comparable to the combat power of His Royal Highness.

Burst!

The spike of the humanoid creature's right hand stabbed violently, directly penetrating the space, stabbing towards Ye Tian, the spike carried a high-level spell Gu poison, once it was penetrated by this creature, others would definitely not be able to resist the curse Gu poison.

Ye Tian slashed at the spike of the humanoid creature's right hand, trying to slash it with a single sword.

However.

This spike was directly split into countless spikes, some of which were shattered by Ye Tian, but some of the spikes broke Ye Tian's defensive circle, and even penetrated Ye Tian's defense and the Mixed Yuan Scale Armor.

Several of the spikes pierced into Ye Tian's skin, and although they did not penetrate Ye Tian's body, the curse Gu poison on the spikes penetrated deep into Ye Tian's blood.

"God-level poison curse talent, expel!"

Ye Tian used the power of the god-level poison spell talent to quickly expel the curse Gu poison from the blood in his body.

This process was very simple, but Ye Tian was also secretly very happy.

If it weren't for the god-level poison curse talent, he would have planted it this time!

"The difficulty of the anti-heaven level is really terrifying, the strength of this humanoid creature is equivalent to the top god-level supreme-level highness, second only to my strength. But if I didn't have a god-level poison curse talent, I would have been invaded by the curse Gu poison just now, and my combat power would have dropped greatly, and I wouldn't be the opponent of this humanoid creature at all!" Ye Tian thought.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

Ye Tian fought with this humanoid creature again and again, although he broke his defenses with the humanoid creature many times and fell into its curse poison, but Ye Tian relied on his god-level poison curse talent, so he was fine.

And the humanoid creature also withstood Ye Tian's attacks many times, and the injuries were not light.

Ye Tian's power was endless, and he was not afraid of the curse and poison environment here, so he was not afraid of this humanoid creature at all.

Suddenly, Ye Tian seized an opportunity and used his own divine secret technique.

"Mixed Element Vine!"

Countless hybrid vines enveloped the humanoid creature, trapping it temporarily.

Although in the blink of an eye, the humanoid creature broke through the Mixed Yuan Vine, the Five Elements Divine Wheel also followed to suppress it, and the dense spatial blades shot out, constantly bombarding the humanoid creature.

At the same time, Ye Tian accumulated his strength to unleash the amazing sword of the Tianyue Knife.

Rumble!!!!

The terrifying sword path mastery bombarded the humanoid creature's neck, nearly decapitating the humanoid creature.

With one successful move, Ye Tian used the spear of time.

The Spear of Time can shave off lifespan, which is useless for humanoids, but it can still annihilate the vitality of humanoids, leaving them in a weakened state.

Burst!

The spear of time ran through it, weakening the humanoids.

Then, Ye Tian froze time again, completely freezing the thinking of the humanoid creature.

Ye Tian completely grasped this opportunity and frantically performed a series of moves, beating the humanoid creature to the ground one after another.

In a few moments, the humanoid was completely devastated.

"The winner is decided!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

Soon, Ye Tian used the Heavenly Moon Knife and the Space Divine Power and Time Divine Power many times in a row, making the humanoid creatures completely unable to compete.

This battle lasted for several hours, and in the end, the humanoid creatures were completely annihilated by Ye Tian.

Until the humanoid died, the machine spirit did not come out to remove the humanoid.

Obviously, in the eyes of the Yuan Gu Palace, although this humanoid creature is very strong, it has no value to improve, and it doesn't matter if you give up.

And the current strength of the cursed poison beast is not weak This humanoid creature, but it is a real creature, it can become a supreme-level creature, it has the value of cultivation, and naturally it will not be abandoned.

After killing the humanoid, the voice of the machine spirit came.

"Hold on for one minute under the attack of the 30% clones of the Son of Epoch, and you can complete the Heaven-Defying difficulty!"

Son of the Epoch?

Ye Tian heard this title for the first time, but he felt an inexplicable crisis and pressure.

This is definitely not something that can be done easily, and the Children of the Epochs are most likely a level above the Children of the Universe.

The humanoid creature just now was already a god-level top supreme-level highness's combat power, so now he needed to face the attack of the 30% clone of the son of the era, and hold on for a minute, the strength of the son of the era far surpassed that humanoid creature one hundred percent.

Rumble!!!

A young man wearing silver armor, black skin, black hair, and golden eyes walked out of the void, and the terrifying aura made Ye Tian tremble a little.

"This is only a 30% copy of the Child of the Era, how terrible is the complete Body of the Child of the Era, wouldn't it kill me in seconds?" Ye Tian said in shock.

At this moment, the Son of the Era made a move, and he didn't give Ye Tian the slightest time to prepare.

A spear pierced through it, carrying supreme power, and it did not contain the power of curse poison.

In the face of the power here, in fact, the curse Gu poison is nothing.

For example, under the power of this Son of the Era, a mere curse Gu poison can't be approached at all, so what's the use.

In the face of the spear of the son of the era, Ye Tian used various defensive means and talents, but under the spear, these defenses were broken one after another.

Burst!

A spear pierced Ye Tian's body, and a trace of blood floated on his chest.

However, Ye Tian still survived after all, and under the effect of various recovery talents, he was only moderately injured, not seriously injured and dying.

However, the attacks of the Children of the Ages descend again, and they continue to do so.

Ye Tian used all kinds of means, just to maintain immortality, and he had no intention of resisting at all.

Time passed by second, although it only took one minute to last, but every second was a ghost gate for Ye Tian.

Under Ye Tian's desperate dodging and saving his life, a minute finally passed.
